title: Hybrid Blockchain App

title: Spoofing Research [Private]

title: THRML [Open Source]

title: Wikipedia Universe
description: Explore the graph-like structure representing the relationships between Wikipedia articles. The application updates in real time as it crawls through new links. It also stores the article titles in a text file for later reference.

title: Zotero iCloud [Open Source]
description: Attachment storage toggle (device vs iCloud) with path routing and availability handling in Zotero iOS. Downloads check iCloud first before falling back to Zotero/WebDAV; uploads write to iCloud container paths while preserving metadata.
